mapper.sql:
WHERE trc.trc_owr_id = #{owrId} AND trc.trc_status_cd IN ( 'TRC_DONE', 'TRC_DISPATCH_WAIT', 'TRC_DISPATCH_DONE', 'TRC_ARR_ARRIVED', 'TRC_NTC_NSENT', 'TRC_NTC_SENT', 'TRC_DO_READY', 'TRC_DO_ISSUED', 'TRC_DO_REQ', 'TRC_STL_UNPAID', 'TRC_STL_REQ', 'TRC_STL_PAID', 'TRC_END', 'TRC_COMPLETE' )
AND trc.trc_se_cd = #{tradeSeCd}
AND trc.trc_status_cd IN ( 'TRC_DONE', 'TRC_DISPATCH_WAIT', 'TRC_DISPATCH_DONE', 'TRC_ARR_ARRIVED', 'TRC_NTC_NSENT', 'TRC_NTC_SENT', 'TRC_DO_READY', 'TRC_DO_ISSUED', 'TRC_DO_REQ', 'TRC_STL_UNPAID', 'TRC_STL_REQ', 'TRC_STL_PAID' )
AND trc.trc_status_cd = #{statusCd}
AND trc.trc_rcept_dt >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND trc.trc_rqst_dt >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND trc.trc_rcept_dt < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND trc.trc_rqst_dt < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND ( trc.trc_no LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR tm.tm_cp_nm LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR tm.tm_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR trc.trc_owr_pic_nm LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR trc.trc_rqst_cn LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
mapper.select: SELECT owr_id, owr_password, owr_ty_cd, owr_nm, owr_bizrno, owr_ident_no, owr_cstm_idf_no, owr_email, owr_telno, owr_zip, owr_adres, owr_detail_adres, owr_use_yn, owr_regist_dt, owr_updt_dt, privacy_agree_yn, owr_corp_reg_no FROM owner WHERE owr_id = #{owrId}
SELECT tm_no, tm_id, tm_password, tm_cp_nm, tm_cp_telno, tm_mn_cd, tm_name, tm_use_yn FROM transport_manager
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tran_rcp trc INNER JOIN transport_manager tm ON trc.trc_tm_no = tm.tm_no

SELECT trc.trc_no , trc.trc_tm_no , trc.trc_owr_id , trc.trc_tfg_no , trc.trc_se_cd , trc.trc_rqst_cn , trc.trc_status_cd , trc.trc_owr_pic_nm , trc.trc_rqst_dt , trc.trc_rcept_dt
, tm.tm_cp_nm , tm.tm_name , tm.tm_cp_telno
, CASE trc.trc_se_cd WHEN 'EXP' THEN 'EXPORT' WHEN 'IMP' THEN 'IMPORT' ELSE trc.trc_se_cd END AS trc_se_nm
, CASE WHEN trc.trc_status_cd IN ( 'TRC_DONE', 'TRC_DISPATCH_WAIT', 'TRC_DISPATCH_DONE', 'TRC_ARR_ARRIVED', 'TRC_NTC_NSENT', 'TRC_NTC_SENT', 'TRC_DO_READY', 'TRC_DO_ISSUED', 'TRC_DO_REQ', 'TRC_STL_UNPAID', 'TRC_STL_REQ', 'TRC_STL_PAID' ) THEN 'CONTRACT_ACTIVE' WHEN trc.trc_status_cd = 'TRC_END' THEN 'TRC_END' WHEN trc.trc_status_cd = 'TRC_COMPLETE' THEN 'TRC_COMPLETE' ELSE trc.trc_status_cd END AS trc_status_nm
, NVL(trc.trc_rcept_dt, trc.trc_rqst_dt) AS last_update_dt
FROM tran_rcp trc INNER JOIN transport_manager tm ON trc.trc_tm_no = tm.tm_no
ORDER BY CASE WHEN trc.trc_status_cd IN ( 'TRC_DONE', 'TRC_DISPATCH_WAIT', 'TRC_DISPATCH_DONE', 'TRC_ARR_ARRIVED', 'TRC_NTC_NSENT', 'TRC_NTC_SENT', 'TRC_DO_READY', 'TRC_DO_ISSUED', 'TRC_DO_REQ', 'TRC_STL_UNPAID', 'TRC_STL_REQ', 'TRC_STL_PAID' ) THEN 1 WHEN trc.trc_status_cd = 'TRC_END' THEN 2 WHEN trc.trc_status_cd = 'TRC_COMPLETE' THEN 3 ELSE 9 END, NVL(trc.trc_rcept_dt, trc.trc_rqst_dt) DESC, trc.trc_no DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
